title: Shrimp Tacos
ingredients: Shrimp, tortillas, cabbage, lime, sour cream, cilantro, avocado
instructions: Cook shrimp with spices. Warm tortillas. Assemble tacos with cabbage, shrimp, avocado, and sauce. Squeeze lime on top.

title: Margherita Pizza
ingredients: Pizza dough, tomato sauce, mozzarella, basil, olive oil, salt
instructions: Roll dough. Spread tomato sauce. Add mozzarella and basil. Bake until crust is golden and cheese melts.

title: Miso Soup
ingredients: Miso paste, tofu, seaweed, green onions, dashi broth
instructions: Heat broth. Dissolve miso paste. Add tofu and seaweed. Garnish with green onions and serve hot.

title: Banana Bread
ingredients: Bananas, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking soda, vanilla
instructions: Mash bananas. Mix with wet ingredients. Add dry ingredients. Bake in loaf pan until golden brown.
